stories.title: Pakistan hosts U.S.-Iran peace talks after weeks of frantic diplomacy
stories.description: Pakistan's capital, Islamabad, is set to host peace talks today with leaders from Iran and the US, including Vice President J.D. Vance.

stories.title: VP Vance to lead U.S. team in Iran peace talks. And, Artemis II to return to Earth
stories.description: Vice President Vance is heading to Pakistan to lead a U.S. team in talks aimed at ending the war in Iran. And, Artemis II is set to return to Earth today.

stories.title: Iran delegates arrive in Islamabad for talks with U.S., as ceasefire terms remain in dispute
stories.description: The fragile ceasefire agreement was tested again on Friday after Iran refused to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Israel and Hezbollah traded strikes in Lebanon, and Kuwait was attacked with drones.

stories.title: Vance heads to Pakistan for talks to end the war between Iran, the US and Israel
stories.description: Vice President JD Vance enters his highest-profile moment Friday as lead U.S. negotiator in face-to-face talks with Iran.

stories.title: India cracks down on social media jokes criticizing prime minister
stories.description: As criticism of Prime Minister Narendra Modi's response to the Iran war grows, government censors are scrambling to knock down memes that use the Indian leader as the punchline.

stories.title: How governments have tried to hide information about the Iran war online
stories.description: Governments are blocking the internet, banning social media posts and cutting access to commercial satellite images. But experts say that efforts to censor information have had mixed results.

stories.title: War in Iran strands tons of tea in Kenyan port
stories.description: Iran war-linked shipping disruptions have stranded 8 million kg of tea in the Kenyan port of Mombasa, costing the industry about $8 million a week in mounting losses.

stories.title: Historic Vance-Ghalibaf talks must bridge deep distrust
stories.description: Face-to-face talks would mark the highest-level engagement between Iran and the US since the 1979 Islamic Revolution.

stories.title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
stories.description: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.

stories.title: 'Endless fears': Even if fighting stops, the damage to Iran's children will endure
stories.description: The BBC has been able to obtain testimony from parents and those trying to help children deal with the distress that comes with war.

stories.title: Lebanon thought there was a ceasefire - then Israel unleashed deadly blitz
stories.description: Israel says Lebanon is not included in the ceasefire the US agreed to halt the war with Iran.

stories.title: Has US achieved its war objectives in Iran?
stories.description: Key US objectives at the start of the war were to stop Iran getting a nuclear weapon and degrading its arsenal.

stories.title: Israeli strikes in Lebanon 'grave violation' of ceasefire, Iran minister tells BBC
stories.description: Iran's deputy foreign minister says the US must choose between 'war and ceasefire'.

stories.title: How many ships are crossing the Strait of Hormuz?
stories.description: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.

stories.title: Negotiators face huge task to close gaps in rival Iran peace proposals
stories.description: The US has a 15-point plan to end the war, with Iran offering 10 proposals of its own. Can they be reconciled?

stories.title: At least 182 killed across Lebanon in large wave of Israeli strikes
stories.description: Attacks hit the southern suburbs of Beirut, southern Lebanon and the eastern Bekaa Valley, hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced.

stories.title: Israel backs US-Iran ceasefire but Netanyahu's war goals remain unfulfilled
stories.description: The Israeli prime minister's response to the ceasefire has been muted, in contrast to the triumphal statements from the US and Iran.

stories.title: Why ceasefire deal with US has unsettled Iran's hardliners
stories.description: The two-week truce opens up the prospect of direct talks with the US but has angered Iran's hardliners, writes BBC News Persian’s Kasra Naji.

stories.title: Iran ceasefire deal gives Trump a way out of war - but at a high cost
stories.description: The path to the two-week ceasefire with Iran may have fundamentally altered the way the rest of the world views the US.

stories.title: What we know about the two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran
stories.description: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.

stories.title: How Pakistan helped secure a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran
stories.description: Pakistan has a historic relationship with Iran, but an agreement was far from certain, writes the BBC’s Caroline Davies

stories.title: Little sign of breakthrough as Trump's Iran deadline nears
stories.description: The US president is in a delicate political position as the final hours to Tuesday's deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz tick down.

stories.title: Ceasefire & Peacetalks, Hungary 'False Flags' & Final Rallies
stories.description: In a week that started with US President Donald Trump threatening to wipe out a whole civilisation in Iran if the regime failed to respond to his ultimatum, pesidential decorum went out of the window, with Trump unfiltered, f-ing and jeffing on Easter Sunday as he warned Iran to ...

stories.title: Middle East war live: US delegation arrives in Pakistan for peace talks with Iran
stories.description: Top US officials landed in Islamabad ⁠on Saturday to meet with representatives from Iran for ‌peace talks aimed at ending the six-week-old ​war that has killed thousands of people across ​the Middle ​East. Read our liveblog to follow the latest developments.

stories.title: 'Trump harbors an unexplained sympathy for Vladimir Putin', Ukrainian analyst says
stories.description: Ukrainian leadership on April 8 hailed the two-week ceasefire reached between the U.S. and Iran but stressed it is time to pressure Russia to end its war in Ukraine as well. Speaking with FRANCE 24's Mark Owen, Peter Zalmayev, Founder and Director of the Eurasia Democracy Initiat...

stories.title: Beirut hospitals overwhelmed, survivors recount carnage scenes
stories.description: A day after intense Israeli strikes pounded Lebanon’s capital, survivors on Thursday recounted scenes of carnage as hospitals struggled to cope with a surge of casualties. Wednesday marked the deadliest day in Lebanon in more than five weeks of renewed war between Israel and the ...

stories.title: France's drone minehunters target Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: As the Strait of Hormuz remains at a standstill Iran has affirmed that a large part of the passage contains naval mines that will explode ships passing through. Very few companies are capable of de-mining seas. But, our colleagues at France 2 met a French one who has developed a ...

stories.title: US and Iran prepare for ceasefire talks as Netanyahu authorises negotiations with Lebanon
stories.description: Negotiators from Iran and the U.S. prepared for high-level talks with their ceasefire still shaky Friday, as Israel and Hezbollah traded fire and Tehran maintained its stranglehold on the Strait of Hormuz. FRANCE 24's Hoda Abdel-Hamid reports from Doha, Qatar.

stories.title: Inside the Iran war decision making: NYT describes how Trump chose to go to war
stories.description: An exclusive report published in the New York Times, with the title 'How Trump Took the U.S. to War With Iran' outlines how, in the run up to the Iran war, President Trump weighed his instincts to go to war against the deep concerns of his vice president and also a pessimistic in...

stories.title: Cloud of uncertainty over US-Iran talks in Pakistan as sides trade accusations
stories.description: A cloud of uncertainty hung Friday over the scheduled start of talks in Pakistan between the United States and Iran, with no announcement yet on the arrival of negotiators and both sides accusing the other of failing to properly implement a fragile ceasefire. US President Donald ...

stories.title: France's Macron talks war, peace and basketball with Pope Leo
stories.description: Pope Leo XIV and French President Emmanuel Macron held their first meeting Friday, a private audience at the Vatican where discussions ranged from the Iran war to basketball. The French leader wanted above all to discuss "the resolution of the crisis in the Middle East" with the ...

stories.title: Israel rejects ceasefire with Hezbollah ahead of Lebanon talks next week
stories.description: Talks due in Washington as Israeli attacks on Lebanon continue, Iran says ceasefire must include them.

stories.title: Video: Vance arrives in Pakistan for talks with Iran
stories.description: US Vice President JD Vance has landed in Pakistan for talks with Iranian officials on a deal to end the war on Iran.

stories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 43 of the US-Iran conflict?
stories.description: Senior Iranian officials arrive in Islamabad for ceasefire talks with the United States.

stories.title: Pakistan ambassador speaks to Al Jazeera on eve of US-Iran talks
stories.description: Pakistan’s ambassador to the US said weeks of intense diplomatic efforts have led to a shared commitment from all sides.

stories.title: Pakistan’s prime minister calls US-Iran talks ‘make or break’
stories.description: Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has described the upcoming US-Iran talks in Islamabad as “make or break”.

stories.title: Trump says Strait of Hormuz to reopen ‘soon’ as US, Iran head to talks
stories.description: Trump says Washington will not accept Iran's imposition of a de facto toll booth system in the critical waterway.

stories.title: Iran war live: Vance arrives in Pakistan to lead ceasefire talks
stories.description: US Vice President J D Vance arrives in Pakistan to lead the highest level talks with Iran since 1979 Islamic revolution.

stories.title: Hezbollah rocket attack damages 1,500-year-old Israeli church
stories.description: Hezbollah fired a barrage of rockets at northern Israel, damaging a 1,500-year-old Byzantine church in Nahariya.

stories.title: Iranian delegation arrives in Islamabad for talks with US
stories.description: A senior Iranian delegation has arrived in Islamabad for talks with US officials.

stories.title: Islamabad on lockdown ahead of US-Iran talks
stories.description: Islamabad has deployed more than 10,000 military and police personnel as US and Iranian delegations arrive.

stories.title: US Vice President JD Vance arrives in Islamabad for ‘make-or-break’ talks with Iran
stories.description: United States Vice President JD Vance and his delegation arrived in Pakistan on Saturday morning for historic talks with the Iranian leadership. The talks are taking place during a two-week halt in the US-Israeli war against Iran, which began with US-Israeli attacks on February 2...

stories.description: WASHINGTON: As indirect diplomacy between the United States and Iran converges on Islamabad in the coming hours, the messaging from Washington has settled into a carefully managed tone of cautious optimism—tempered by clear acknowledgment that the process remains fragile. stories.title: Conscientious objections to war rise sharply in US
stories.description: • Growing number of service members seeking information on how to apply for discharge• March alone saw over 80 new cases, nearly double annual norm• School bombing in Iran cited as key turning point by many callers WASHINGTON: The US-Israeli war against Iran has caused an unprece...

stories.title: Starmer says Nato in America’s ‘interests’ as Gulf tour ends
stories.description: BRITISH PM Keir Starmer shakes hands with his Qatari counterpart Mohammed bin Abdulrahman.—Reuters • Calls alliance a ‘defensive’ bloc that has ensured decades of safety for Europe• Comments follow Trump’s threats to withdraw after allies refuse to join Iran war• PM says Britain ...

stories.title: War impact on fertilisers worries food producers
stories.description: PARIS: Even as Gulf tanker traffic slowly resumes, the road back to normal food production will be long and arduous, given the war’s impact on fertiliser supplies, the UN has warned. With factories shuttered and soaring gas prices driving up production costs around the world, fer...

stories.title: Russia, Ukraine agree on truce for Orthodox Easter
stories.description: KYIV: Russia and Ukraine have agreed to a ceasefire over Orthodox Easter, a temporary truce that the Kremlin says will begin on Saturday afternoon and end on Sunday night. Russian President Vladimir Putin ordered the ceasefire late on Thursday, more than a week after Ukrainian Pr...

stories.title: Islamabad keyed up for ‘make-or-break’ talks
stories.description: • US-Iran dialogue set to begin after last-minute Lebanon hurdle eased• Backchannel diplomacy led by Pakistan helps secure partial pause in strikes• Iranian delegation arrives in Islamabad; Vance-led US team was due early morning• Tehran conditioned participation on ceasefire in ...

stories.description: • Worshippers describe an ‘indescribable happiness’, one calls it ‘a miracle’• Tensions flare as police disperse Muslims at Al Aqsa for Jewish visitors JERUSALEM : Just before 5am at Jerusalem’s Al Aqsa Mosque compound, a Muslim worshipper prayed in tears. stories.title: Israel blocks Spain from US-led centre monitoring Gaza truce
stories.description: Israel said on Friday it had blocked Spain from participating in the work of a US-led centre established to help stabilise post-war Gaza following the ceasefire between Israel and Hamas. The Civil-Military Coordination Centre (CMCC) in Kiryat Gat was set up after the ceasefire to...

stories.title: ‘World doesn’t have a plan B’: Bilawal stresses need for US-Iran talks to lead to peaceful resolution of conflict
stories.description: Former foreign minister and PPP Chairman Bilawal Bhutto Zardari has said that the world does not have a “plan B” if the US-Iran talks fail to yield the desired results and emphasised the need for the negotiations to lead to a peaceful resolution to the Middle East war. Bilawal sh...

stories.title: Vance en route, Iranian delegation touches down for Islamabad talks
stories.description: The delegation from Iran touched down in Islamabad late on Friday night ahead of talks with the United States, with US Vice President JD Vance and his delegation en route to Pakistan as well. The talks are taking place during a two-week halt in the US-Israeli war on Iran, which b...

stories.title: Britain accuses Russia of ‘covert’ op in North Atlantic
stories.description: LONDON: Britain said on Thursday it had tracked and deterred three Russian submarines on an alleged month-long “covert operation” in UK waters in the North Atlantic near vital undersea cables and pipelines. Disclosing details of the joint mission with Norway and other unspecified...

stories.title: US forces to remain deployed near Iran until ‘real’ agreement reached, says Trump
stories.description: WASHINGTON: US President Donald Trump vowed on Thur­sday to retain military assets in the Middle East until a peace deal with Iran is reached and warned of a major escalation in fighting if Iran failed to comply. Trump said in a social media post that US ships, aircraft, and pers...

stories.title: Hormuz traffic plummets as Iran asserts control
stories.description: • Global oil supply cut by 20pc; backlog of hundreds of ships grows• Truce brings little relief as security firms warn of persistent risks LONDON: Ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz stood at well below 10 per cent of normal volumes on Thursday despite a US-Iran ceasefire a...

stories.title: Israel-Iran war LIVE updates: Pakistan Foreign Minister hopes U.S., Iran will engage constructively in peace talks
stories.description: The Iranian delegation arrived in Pakistan this morning for talks with U.S., Vance also landed in Pakistan for talks with Iran, Pakistani source told Reuters

stories.title: Iran’s uranium enrichment secures independence, peaceful atom — supreme leader
stories.description: Ali Khamenei added that the US and other countries are not interested in Iran's progress and have put forward conditions presupposing a complete halt of uranium enrichment on Iranian territory

stories.title: Tehran could weigh nuclear deal with US with Iran-based enrichment consortium — Axios
stories.description: According to the report, a sixth round of talks on the Iranian nuclear program between the US president’s Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and Iran’s top diplomat, Abbas Araghchi, could be held this weekend in a Middle Eastern country

stories.title: DPRK slams U.S. for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang
stories.description: The Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) has slammed the United States for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang.
